description_long: This is a plush toy modeled after a classic rubber duck, featuring a rounded yellow body and a prominent orange beak. The toy has two small, rounded wings on either side and a short, stubby tail at the back. Its eyes are large, round, and cartoonish, with a white highlight and black pupils, giving it a friendly and playful appearance. The surface appears soft and slightly matte, with subtle texturing that mimics the look of fabric or soft vinyl. The beak is glossy and slightly raised, adding a tactile contrast to the rest of the body. There are no visible seams, clothing, or accessories, and the overall form is compact and squeezable, typical of a child's stuffed animal.
description: A soft, yellow duck plush toy with a bright orange beak and large, expressive eyes. The toy has a rounded body and small wings, giving it a cute and playful look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the duck's orange beak, large eyes, and both wings clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the back of the head, one eye, and the curve of the body with the beak partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded back, tail, and both wings, with the face not visible.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the profile of the beak, one eye, and one wing, with the body curving backward.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with wide, round eyes and a slightly open, smiling beak. The eyes have a bright highlight, adding to the playful and inviting look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a sitting posture with its body upright, wings slightly out to the sides, and head raised, as if floating or resting.
